notebook.title: Lab Notebook
notebook.subtitle: Electronic Laboratory Records / High Density Logs
notebook.example_content: Initial observations in the GFP-Beta 12 strain indicate a significant increase in bioluminescent intensity under low-glucose conditions. The doubling time reduced from 45m to 22m, which was unexpected based on previous literature (Sterling et al., 2024). We are currently monitoring the metabolic load to ensure protein synthesis stability.

analytics.title: Growth Metrics
analytics.note_content: Batch 003B shows higher bioluminescence levels compared to baseline, possibly indicating over-expression of the reporter gene.
